blocks.content:
This guide teaches you how to revert to a previous version of a configuration pipeline.

Grafana Fleet Management tracks changes to configuration pipelines and displays them in the **Pipelines history** feature on the **Remote configuration** tab. With this history, your team can collaborate more efficiently, ensure audit compliance, and troubleshoot issues caused by configuration changes.

The log tracks creation and deletion of pipelines, changes to configuration content, and modifications to matching attributes. You can review changes for a specific pipeline by searching the log for a pipeline name, ID, or matching attribute.
Find the configuration pipeline by searching the log for a pipeline name, ID, or matching attribute.
Click the Pipeline history icon for the configuration pipeline you want to revert.
Click the History details button for the change you want to review.
Once you're sure this is the version you want, click Restore to review your selection and pick the matching attributes to apply.

steps.description: Click the Restore button to review the configuration pipeline.
Review the configuration and select the matching attributes you want to apply.
Click the Restore button to restore the pipeline version.
